title: FactSet Reports Results for First Quarter 2024
text: NORWALK, Conn., Dec. 19, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- FactSet (“FactSet” or the “Company”) (NYSE:FDS) (NASDAQ:FDS), a global financial digital platform and enterprise solutions provider, today announced results for its first fiscal 2024 quarter ended November 30, 2023.

title: FactSet: Navigating The Future Of Financial Data With Innovation And AI
text: FactSet is a financial data and software tools provider, offering detailed and up-to-date information for investment professionals. FactSet is considered more cost-effective and user-friendly compared to competitors like Bloomberg. FactSet is exploring AI technology to enhance its services and provide smart insights and easy-to-use tools for its customers.

title: Factset: A High-Quality Compounder
text: FactSet offers crucial financial data access to investors and operates in a competitive industry alongside MSCI and S&P Global. In Q4 2023, FactSet reported solid revenue growth and expects continued growth in fiscal 2024. FactSet is strategically investing in Artificial Intelligence to enhance its offerings and stay ahead in the financial data industry.
